calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-10-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:00 A.M.: THIS CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DATE FOR SMALL CLAIM APPEAL AS REGULARLY SCHEDULED WITH PARTIES FOR BOTH SIDES, THE COURT, AND COURTROOM PERSONNEL PRESENT. THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO ALL PARTIES. BRIAN J. HAR, ESQ. APPEARS ON BEHALF OF RESPONDENT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY WITH RESPONDENT MR. XIAO "SEAN" WANG, ALSO PRESENT.
9:19 A.M.: THE COURT COMMENCES TO HEAR STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES WHO ALSO SUBMIT DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE TO THE COURT, PREVIOUSLY MARKED BY THE CLERK.
10:52 A.M.: THE COURT THEN ALLOWS PARTIES FOR BOTH SIDES TO RESPOND ORALLY TO THE COURT ON ALL ISSUES INTRODUCED UNTIL 11:01 A.M.

11:07 A.M.: AFTER HEARING ALL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND AFTER RECEIVING AND REVIEWING ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBISSION AND INFORMS PARTIES THEY WILL BE NOTIFIED OF THE COURT'S DECISION BY MAIL. BOTH PARTIES AND COUNSEL INFORM THE COURT THAT NONE OF THE EXHIBITS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES NEED BE RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE PARTIES OR COUNSEL.

11:10 A.M.: COURT IS ADJOURNED.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-28-2016 Continued To Nov-10-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Continued To Aug-22-16 At 06:30 P.M. In Dept 506
